message:
chore: add local_target/ and tmp_target/ to gitignore

These are alternate build directories used by agents for isolated
compilation. They contain only build artifacts and should not be
tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -106,6 +106,10 @@ test_expand.rs
 test_ip.rs
 /test_*.rs
 
+# Local/alternate build target directories (agent experiments)
+local_target/
+tmp_target/
+
 # Build/test artifacts directory
 artifacts/
